title: TrueCraft Lite
description: A lightweight Fabric modpack for Minecraft, built to feel like the game used to—Client Side.
body:
TrueCraft — A Nostalgic Return to Vanilla Minecraft

Step back into the golden era of Minecraft with TrueCraft, a clean and lightweight Fabric modpack designed to revive the simplicity and charm of classic gameplay—while still running smoothly on modern setups.

Features:

    Old Textures – Take a step into a nostalgic time machine with Programmer Art Continuation Pack.

    Moderner Beta – Revives the Alpha/Beta-era feel with old world generation, along with consoles and mobile devices as well.

    Smoother UI and Inventory – With mods like Inventory Sorter, Mouse Tweaks, and JEI.

    Better Lighting – LambDynamicLights and Iris add dynamic torches and shader compatibility.

    Fog – The Fog mod enhances atmosphere without breaking the classic look.
